input: user-item multi-behavior interaction graph (e.g., view, click, buy)
output: recommendation scores for target behavior (e.g., buy)
backbone: combinatorial optimization guided GCN (COGCN) + multi-expert fusion (DFME)
loss: multi-task learning loss (not explicitly named in abstract)
key_idea: treat multi-behavior fusion as a combinatorial optimization problem with behavior-specific constraints, and mitigate negative transfer via distribution-aware multi-expert fusion
datasets: three real-world datasets (not named in abstract)
